title: Senvo Optimised
description: A minimal FPS-boosting and PvP-focused modpack built for smooth combat, clean visuals, and low-latency gameplay. Run faster, fight better.
body:
# Senvo Optimised
[Senvo San [YT]](https://youtube.com/@senvosan?si=RMyAusSZWaH8XPKu)

**Senvo Optimised** is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to boost FPS and create a smooth, lag-free PvP experience. Featuring essential optimization mods, improved hit registration, reduced visual clutter, and QoL enhancements, this pack gives you a competitive edge without changing core gameplay.

Perfect for PvP servers, duels, and anyone who wants the fastest, cleanest Minecraft experience possible.
